_comment: control17 server config. Each token entry has { name, kind, tokenHash }. To rotate or add a principal by hand, add { "name": "...", "kind": "<any label>", "token": "<plaintext>" } and the server will hash it on next boot and rewrite this file. `kind` is freeform (e.g. operator, agent, service, ci, monitor) — it labels the principal in logs but does not gate auth.
